title: Platform Config
description: Per-platform configuration declaring the vendor, ASIC, port layout, and one or more configuration variants for the asic_config_v3 generator.

platform_name.description: Platform identifier. Must match the directory name under platforms/.

vendor.description: ASIC vendor identifier. Must match a directory name under vendors/.

asic.description: ASIC chip identifier. Must match the basename of a JSON file under vendors/<vendor>/asics/.

num_ports_per_core.description: Number of front-panel ports per ASIC core. Combined with num_lanes_per_core to derive the number of lanes per port, unless num_lanes_per_port is set explicitly.

num_lanes_per_port.description: Optional. Explicit override of the lanes-per-port value derived from num_lanes_per_core / num_ports_per_core. Used by platforms that wire only a subset of the ASIC lanes per port.

defaults.description: Shared variant fields inherited by every variant via deep merge. Values declared inside a specific variant override the corresponding entries in this block.

variants.description: Named configuration variants for this platform. Each variant produces a separate output config file.

variant.description: A single configuration variant. Fields may be omitted when their value is inherited from the platform-level defaults block.

asic_config_params.description: Parameters controlling generator behavior for this variant.

exact_match.description: When true, enables exact-match forwarding table entries.

mmu_lossless.description: When true, enables MMU lossless mode for PFC / RDMA workloads.

config_gen_type.description: Configuration generation profile. Controls which vendor configuration profile is applied.

port_config.description: Front-panel port settings. Fields may be omitted in a variant when inherited from the platform defaults.

default_speed.description: Default port speed in Mbps (e.g. 400000 for 400 GbE).

speed_to_fec.description: Mapping from port speed (encoded as a decimal string) to FEC mode.

enable.description: Optional. Value emitted as PC_PORT.ENABLE for front-panel ports. Defaults to 0.

link_training.description: Optional. When set, emits LINK_TRAINING: <value> on front-panel PC_PORT entries.

num_lanes.description: Number of lanes used by the CPU port.

mgmt_port.description: Management port settings. Fields may be omitted in a variant when inherited from the platform defaults.

enabled.description: Whether the management port is emitted in the generated config.

enable.description: Optional. Value emitted as PC_PORT.ENABLE for the management port. Defaults to 0.

in_port_block.description: Optional. When true, includes the management port in the PORT (MTU) range alongside the front-panel ports.

speed_variants.description: Per-speed management port settings, keyed by port speed (encoded as a decimal string).

device_config_overrides.description: Optional. Key / value pairs written to the DEVICE_CONFIG output table (for example, clock frequencies).

port_mapping_overrides.description: Optional. Overrides for the logical-to-physical port mapping formula.

core_range.description: Comma-separated list of inclusive core ranges to include in the port mapping (e.g. "0-15,48-63"). Defaults to all cores on the ASIC.

num_lp_ports_on_even_core.description: Override for the number of logical ports placed on even-numbered cores.

num_logical_ports_per_datapath.description: Override for the ASIC-level num_logical_ports_per_datapath value.

lp_start_step_offset.description: Offset added to num_logical_ports_per_datapath when computing the per-datapath logical-port start. Defaults to 1.

lp_offset_simple.description: When true, computes the per-port logical-port offset as i * lanes_per_port on all cores rather than using the default even / odd conditional.

core_offset_apply_all.description: When true, applies the +1 core offset to every core rather than only cores 0 and 1. Required for platforms with a linear-stride port layout.

mgmt_port_overrides.description: Optional. Per-platform overrides of the ASIC-level mgmt_port_defaults.

platform_sai_overrides.description: Optional. Platform-level SAI settings layered on top of the ASIC sai_overrides. These take precedence within the global-table layering.

conditional_settings.description: Optional. Platform-level conditional settings, evaluated after the ASIC-level conditional_settings so that platform values take precedence.

features.description: Boolean feature toggles enabling optional config sections. All fields are optional; absent flags default to disabled.

generate_dlb_config.description: When true, includes Dynamic Load Balancing settings from the ASIC dlb_defaults block.

generate_low_clock_freq_settings.description: When true, includes low-clock-frequency device settings.

generate_autoload_board_settings.description: When true, emits AUTOLOAD_BOARD_SETTINGS: 0 in the DEVICE_CONFIG output table.

generate_dlb_ecmp_config.description: When true, emits the DLB_ECMP_CONFIG output table from the ASIC dlb_ecmp_config_defaults block.

preamble_file.description: Optional. Path (relative to the asic_config_v3 module root) of a preamble file prepended to the generated YAML. Honored only when the ASIC declares preamble_support: true.

platform_mapping_name.description: Optional. Overrides the platform_mapping_v2 directory consulted for lane-map and polarity data. Defaults to platform_name. Used when multiple variants share an asic_config but consume sibling platform_mapping_v2 directories.

ctr_eflex_config.description: Optional. Variant-level override of the ASIC ctr_eflex_config pass-through block. When present, replaces the ASIC-level value in its entirety.

num_lanes.description: Number of physical lanes used at this speed.

fec.description: FEC mode applied at this speed.

pmd_firmware.description: Optional. PMD firmware overrides applied at this speed.
